testsuite.name: io.slogr.agent.platform.registration.RegistrationTest

testcase.name: interactive registration stores credential with API_KEY method()
bootstrap registration fails on non-2xx response()
parseCredential without gcp key leaves field null()

testsuite.system-out: 21:13:32.219 [Test worker] DEBUG io.mockk.impl.instantiation.AbstractMockFactory -- Creating mockk for CredentialStore name=#113 21:13:32.240 [Test worker] DEBUG io.mockk.impl.instantiation.AbstractMockFactory -- Creating mockk for CredentialStore name=#114 21:13:32.308 [Test worker] DEBUG io.mockk.impl.instantiation.AbstractMockFactory -- Creating mockk for Unit name=child of #114#115 21:13:32.317 [Test worker @coroutine#312] INFO io.slogr.agent.platform.registration.BootstrapRegistrar -- Bootstrap registration starting... 21:13:34.565 [Test worker @coroutine#312] DEBUG io.mockk.impl.recording.states.AnsweringState -- Answering kotlin.Unit on CredentialStore(#114).store(AgentCredential(agentId=9bc77953-06e5-4c40-8a34-122f5d79b487, tenantId=98813c9f-451d-4c20-914f-0d567573d9ff, displayName=test-agent, jwt=eyJ.test.jwt, rabbitmqJwt=eyJ.rmq.jwt, rabbitmqHost=mq.slogr.io, rabbitmqPort=5671, pubsubSubscription=slogr.agent-commands.9bc77953-06e5-4c40-8a34-122f5d79b487, issuedAt=2026-03-31T16:13:34.564160800Z, connectedVia=BOOTSTRAP_TOKEN, gcpServiceAccountKey=null)) 21:13:34.567 [Test worker @coroutine#312] INFO io.slogr.agent.platform.registration.BootstrapRegistrar -- Bootstrap registration complete.
